title: trisetum phleoides
intro: Trisetum phleoides, also known as Phleoides grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Trisetum phleoides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
